product_highlights: Avobenzone (Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane) - premier broad-spectrum UVA filter
Oil-soluble formulation for sunscreen and cosmetic products
FDA OTC-approved for use in US sunscreen products
Consistent high-purity supply for cosmetic manufacturers
notes: Catalynt is a US-based specialty chemical supplier specializing in avobenzone (CAS 70356-09-1), one of the most widely used broad-spectrum UVA filters in sunscreen and cosmetic formulations. Avobenzone is an oil-soluble chemical filter approved by the FDA as an OTC sunscreen active and provides superior UVA I protection in the 310-400 nm range. Catalynt offers consistent high-purity avobenzone supply for cosmetic manufacturers requiring reliable US-sourced UV filter raw materials.
